prompts.name: Romance
prompts.text: Shape the scene with romance-film warmth, soft emotional tension, gentle lighting, and intimate character focus.

prompts.name: Adventure
prompts.text: Shape the scene with adventure-film energy, travel details, wide environment, and a clear sense of discovery.

prompts.name: Fantasy Epic
prompts.text: Shape the scene with epic fantasy scale, grand architecture or landscapes, heroic posture, and magical atmosphere.

prompts.name: Noir
prompts.text: Shape the scene with noir mood, strong shadows, rainy streets, reflective surfaces, and investigative atmosphere.

prompts.name: Slice of Life
prompts.text: Shape the scene as a natural everyday moment with believable setting, relaxed pose, and soft realism.

prompts.name: Mystery
prompts.text: Shape the scene with mystery atmosphere, subtle clues, restrained tension, and layered environmental storytelling.

prompts.name: Sci-Fi Drama
prompts.text: Shape the scene with futuristic technology, clean lighting, emotional focus, and thoughtful atmosphere.

prompts.name: Cyber Thriller
prompts.text: Shape the scene with neon light, surveillance mood, dense city detail, and stylish futuristic tension.

prompts.name: Comedy
prompts.text: Shape the scene with playful timing, expressive pose, bright mood, and light visual energy.

prompts.name: Historical Drama
prompts.text: Shape the scene with period clothing, grounded environment, refined lighting, and emotional realism.

prompts.name: Dark Fantasy
prompts.text: Shape the scene with ornate shadowed detail, controlled gloom, supernatural atmosphere, and dramatic elegance.

prompts.name: Magical Transformation
prompts.text: Shape the scene with sparkling transformation energy, graceful pose, bright color, and heroic charm.

prompts.name: Road Trip
prompts.text: Shape the scene with travel atmosphere, open roads, luggage, vehicle detail, and a sense of movement.

prompts.name: Stage Performance
prompts.text: Shape the scene with stage lighting, spotlight focus, polished costume, and performance energy.

prompts.name: Dream Sequence
prompts.text: Shape the scene with surreal softness, floating details, gentle glow, and emotional symbolism.
